TASK.TITLE: Backend Optimization & API Contract Improvements
TASK.DESCRIPTION: Improve backend performance and API design by eliminating inefficient queries, adding missing endpoints, and enhancing overall contract consistency.

OPTIMIZATION.name: N+1 Query Fix
OPTIMIZATION.ISSUE: Draft loading in studio performs multiple sequential queries for article details.
OPTIMIZATION.REQUIREMENT: Replace with batched queries or include relations in a single query.
OPTIMIZATION.GOAL: Reduce database round trips and improve performance

API_IMPROVEMENT.name: Bookmark Status Endpoint
API_IMPROVEMENT.REQUIREMENT: Add endpoint to check bookmark status for a specific article.
API_IMPROVEMENT.GOAL: Avoid fetching full bookmark list on frontend and filtering manually.

OPTIMIZATION.name: View Tracking
OPTIMIZATION.ISSUE: View tracking currently stored in memory.
OPTIMIZATION.REQUIREMENT: Evaluate persistence strategy (database or external store).

CONTRACT_IMPROVEMENT.REQUIREMENT: Reduce DTO duplication between backend and frontend.
